title: palicourea lineata
intro: Palicourea lineata, also known as the red stripe palicourea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating infections. Palicourea lineata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies and modern herbal supplements.
